problems.title: Does attention entropy predict a head's value?
problems.answer: No — at 0.94M scale, attenuating diffuse heads is null and amplifying confident heads actively hurts (+0.0140). Confident heads are not the valuable ones.

problems.title: Where in a transformer do cheap multiplicative gates help?
problems.answer: Emerging: gating what a head takes IN (V) helps; gating what it puts OUT hurts; input-dependent residual write scaling helps. H1-H5 controls running.

problems.title: Do 1M-param screening wins transfer to 10M+ models?
problems.answer: Screen-tier confirmation runs for both gate wins are in progress.

problems.title: How do we train one LM across donated, heterogeneous, unreliable GPUs?
What fully-open data mix matches SmolLM's curated corpus at 135M scale?
